tutorials.title: Your Claude phone — what's set up, and how to use it
tutorials.blurb: Alan signed into your Claude account on his machine and connected the basics. Here's what's there and how to actually use it from your phone.

news.title: Salesforce + Claude — native MCP integration
news.summary: Claude becomes a native option for Agentforce and internal tooling at Salesforce. Direct RevOps relevance.

news.title: Claude for Work: Slack + Drive + Jira connectors
news.summary: Official list of connectors you can turn on from Claude Desktop. Set up on desktop → works on your phone.

pitch_deck.title: Anthropic Trust Center — SOC 2, ISO 27001 & 42001
pitch_deck.summary: One-page proof pack for your IT/security team. SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001:2022, ISO 42001:2023, HIPAA BAA.

pitch_deck.title: Privacy: how Claude handles your data
pitch_deck.summary: Default 7-day API retention; zero-data-retention (ZDR) available for enterprise. No training on customer data.

pitch_deck.title: Anthropic for Enterprise — SSO, SCIM, audit logs
pitch_deck.summary: Enterprise plan feature list. Answers most objections your IT team will raise in the first meeting.

pitch_deck.title: Claude Code — for the engineers (so they don't block you)
pitch_deck.summary: Developer-facing pitch. Comply365 eng already uses GitHub Copilot; Claude Code is the natural upgrade conversation.
